idea-plugin.name: ZPL Label Viewer
idea-plugin.description:
ZPL Label Viewer — preview and debug ZPL II shipping labels without leaving your IDE.

Features:
  • Auto-detects whether input is raw ZPL or Base-64 encoded ZPL
  • Local renderer — no internet required; supports text, barcodes (Code 128, QR, EAN, UPC-A, Data Matrix), graphic boxes, ellipses, diagonals, and ^GFA compressed bitmaps
  • Labelary API fallback for labels that use unsupported commands
  • Fit-to-window preview with zoom level indicator — no scrolling
  • 200 / 300 DPI selection
  • Save rendered label as PNG
  • View decoded ZPL text from Base-64 input

Powered by zpl-renderer open-source library.
